page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A variational framework for inferring population structure from SNP genotype data.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: fastStructure is an algorithm for inferring population structure from large SNP genotype data. It is based on a variational Bayesian framework for posterior inference and is written in Python2.x.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: fastStructure is an algorithm for inferring population structure from large SNP genotype data. It is based on a variational Bayesian framework for posterior inference and is written in Python2.x.
